reason: historical attempt import from vela-science/erdos-frontier@121807e20b06eb8148f594dfe13e440181252b0f:attack/attempt-ledger.v2.json (provenance, not a verdict)

attempt.claim: DEFINITIVE FULL-CORPUS AUDIT (all 1217 Erdos problems ingested from teorth/erdosproblems): the open-problem-SOLVING hunt is EXHAUSTED. Of 297 open non-prize winning-vein candidates (incl. 141 never-looked-at), audited live with comment-attendedness (wf_87dd3195, 171 agents, 5.2M tokens): 283 analytic-wall, 84 already-done, and ZERO genuine 'we-would-be-first' targets after ledger cross-check.
attempt.detail: Ingested the complete teorth/erdosproblems database (1217 problems: status/prize/oeis/tags). Filtered to 297 OPEN + non-prize + winning-vein (sidon/additive-basis/divisors/unit-fractions/sequences/additive-combinatorics); 141 un-ingested. Audited ALL 297 with live page+comment fetch (the #488/#699/#700 lesson: attendedness is the signal). RESULT: 381 disqualify / 2 maybe / 1 pursue; shapes 283 analytic-wall, 84 already-attended-or-solved, 13 finite-witness/construction/oeis. The ONE would_be_first (#1056) is FALSIFIED -- we already banked witnesses to k=12 (p=17..52163); for-all-k is the Hardy-Subbarao analytic wall. #23 = Lean-scaffold only. #1189 = asymptotic (BBMST24). KEY FINDING: the unattended tail is unattended BECAUSE it is walled (283/384 analytic), not because it is overlooked-and-easy. TWO independent full audits (wf_de3c1580 over the 430 formalized + wf_87dd3195 over the 297 winning-vein) AGREE: the ingested Erdos corpus is exhausted of Vela-solvable OPEN-PROBLEM targets beyond (a) Lean fragments (#23, 358684, #36) and (b) the OEIS construction/lower-bound vein (A309370 Sidon -- where Will is already an ACCEPTED contributor; 31 sidon-tagged + 31 additive-basis + 31 divisor problems carry OEIS sequences). CONCLUSION: pivot from 'solve an open Erdos problem' (exhausted) to 'keep producing accepted OEIS/Lean contributions' (live). The campaign's real deliverable is the verified-state substrate + trust-layer demonstrations (caught the Wang fabrication, the aggregate overclaim, the Parthasarathy hole), not a new theorem.
attempt.reusable_for: definitive map: full 1217-problem Erdos corpus audited; open-solving exhausted; producing veins = OEIS constructions + Lean fragments

import.mapping_reason: Normalize the corpus-level audit to the canonical Erdős frontier.

caveats: A signed banked attempt. Trust is earned via its verifier_attachments + the gate, never from claimed_status.
